/usr/bin/g++ -DQT_QML_DEBUG -g CMakeFiles/imx6ullqt.dir/imx6ullqt_autogen/mocs_compilation.cpp.o CMakeFiles/imx6ullqt.dir/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/imx6ullqt.dir/mainwindow.cpp.o CMakeFiles/imx6ullqt.dir/imx6ullqt_autogen/7BV4YJK25R/qrc_main.cpp.o -o imx6ullqt  /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libQt5Widgets.so.5.15.13 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libQt5Gui.so.5.15.13 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libQt5Core.so.5.15.13
